title: switch-vso-vaultauth-to-jwt
summary: Switched scripts/apply-vso-demo.sh's VaultAuth manifest from Kubernetes auth (method: kubernetes, mount: kubernetes-vso) to JWT/OIDC auth (method: jwt, mount: jwt-vso), with jwt.role/serviceAccount/audiences/tokenExpirationSeconds fields, and updated its static validation test suite; verified live against the two-cluster kind lab that VaultAuth becomes Ready and VaultStaticSecret syncs correctly.
keyLearnings: - Confirmed exact CRD field names live via `kubectl explain vaultauth.spec --recursive`: jwt.{audiences ([]string),role,secretRef,serviceAccount,tokenExpirationSeconds}. No token_reviewer_jwt-equivalent exists under jwt: -- VSO's JWT method uses the pod's own projected ServiceAccount token via jwt.serviceAccount, no stored reviewer credential anywhere.

- Test isolation trick: to assert the old `kubernetes:` stanza is absent, scope the check to just the VaultAuth manifest block (awk '/^kind: VaultAuth$/,/^---$/'), not the whole file -- the file's header comments legitimately still mention auth/kubernetes-vso for historical/migration context.

- grep -qF gotcha: a needle starting with '-' (e.g. '- ${VSO_JWT_AUDIENCE}') is misparsed as a flag ("invalid option --"). Split into two separate asserts instead of matching the YAML list-item dash literal.

- Makefile (`make setup`/`configure-vso-auth`/`vso-apply`) still calls scripts/configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh, not configure-vso-jwt-auth.sh -- that switch and verify-two-cluster.sh's JWT-specific proofs are explicitly scoped to tasks 07 and 08, not 06. Both auth/jwt-vso and auth/kubernetes-vso coexist on the live cluster; only jwt-vso is now exercised by apply-vso-demo.sh.

- Live-verified end to end on the real two-cluster lab: VaultAuth Ready/Healthy with method:jwt mount:jwt-vso; VaultStaticSecret SYNCED/HEALTHY/READY=True; native secret synced with baseline value; app pod Ready. All 12 test suites in scripts/tests/ still pass (25/25 in the updated suite).
blockers: none -- all acceptance/validation criteria for task 06 met. Downstream tasks 07 (Makefile/setup flow) and 08 (verify-two-cluster.sh JWT checks) are the next dependents and still need to switch make setup off configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh.
